name: Giselle Ironwhisper
sd_appearance: A tall, muscular human woman with short, silver-cropped hair and piercing green eyes moves with quiet intensity through the dimly lit streets of the Undercity. Her skin, weathered from countless battles, is complemented by a deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, the subtle Iron Fang mark on her lapel signaling her allegiance. Equipped with daggers and a sling, she is a picture of practicality, her worn boots scuffing the cobblestones with each purposeful step. One distinctive visual detail: a small, delicate locket tucked into her coat, a reminder of the daughter she fights tirelessly to protect.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: practical street clothes, nothing that slows movement, worn boots
